NN_CORE_FOOD_OUTCM_UNK_SW 

LABEL: Navigated Core HRSN Food Outcome Unknown 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation needs (NN): navigated core health related social need (HRSN) food outcome unknown. 

LONG NAME: NN_CORE_FOOD_OUTCM_UNK_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variables that start with “NN” include information
